---
title: Empty Para inlines guard
format: html
filters:
  - at: pre-ast
    path: empty-para-inlines-filter.lua
_quarto:
  tests:
    html:
      noErrors: default
---

## Figure div with content replaced by empty Para

::: {#fig-empty-para}
![Normal image](img/surus.jpg)

Normal caption
:::

See @fig-empty-para.
